mapper.select: SELECT u.USER_ID AS USER_ID, u.USER_NM AS USER_NM, d.DEPT_NM AS DEPT_NM, j.JBGD_NM AS JBGD_NM, fd.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH, mu.ROLE_CD AS ROLE_CD, mu.NOTIFY_YN AS NOTIFY_YN, CASE WHEN u.USER_ID = #{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS ME FROM MESSENGER_USER mu INNER JOIN USERS u ON mu.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON u.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE j ON u.JBGD_CD = j.JBGD_CD LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL fd ON u.USER_IMG_FILE_ID = fd.FILE_ID AND COALESCE(fd.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' WHERE mu.MSGR_ID = #{msgrId} AND mu.LEFT_DT IS NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN mu.ROLE_CD = 'owner' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, u.USER_NM
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MESSENGER_USER ( MSGR_ID, USER_ID, JOIN_DT, LEFT_DT, ROLE_CD, NOTIFY_YN ) VALUES
( #{msgrId}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, COALESCE(#{roleCd}, 'member'), 'Y' )
ON CONFLICT (MSGR_ID, USER_ID) DO UPDATE SET LEFT_DT = NULL, JOIN_DT = COALESCE(MESSENGER_USER.JOIN_DT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), ROLE_CD = CASE WHEN COALESCE(EXCLUDED.ROLE_CD, 'member') = 'owner' THEN 'owner' ELSE COALESCE(MESSENGER_USER.ROLE_CD, EXCLUDED.ROLE_CD, 'member') END, NOTIFY_YN = 'Y'

INSERT INTO MESSENGER_USER ( MSGR_ID, USER_ID, JOIN_DT, LEFT_DT, ROLE_CD, NOTIFY_YN ) VALUES ( #{msgrId}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, COALESCE(#{roleCd}, 'member'), 'Y' ) ON CONFLICT (MSGR_ID, USER_ID) DO UPDATE SET LEFT_DT = NULL, JOIN_DT = COALESCE(MESSENGER_USER.JOIN_DT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), ROLE_CD = CASE WHEN COALESCE(#{roleCd}, 'member') = 'owner' THEN 'owner' ELSE COALESCE(MESSENGER_USER.ROLE_CD, #{roleCd}, 'member') END, NOTIFY_YN = COALESCE(MESSENGER_USER.NOTIFY_YN, 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MESSENGER_USER WHERE MSGR_ID = #{msgrId} AND LEFT_DT IS NULL
SELECT USER_ID FROM MESSENGER_USER WHERE MSGR_ID = #{msgrId} AND LEFT_DT IS NULL AND ROLE_CD = 'owner' ORDER BY JOIN_DT LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MESSENGER_USER ( USER_ID, MSGR_ID, JOIN_DT, LEFT_DT, ROLE_CD, NOTIFY_YN ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{msgrId}, #{joinDt}, #{leftDt}, COALESCE(#{roleCd}, 'member'), COALESCE(#{notifyYn}, 'Y') ) ON CONFLICT (MSGR_ID, USER_ID) DO UPDATE SET LEFT_DT = EXCLUDED.LEFT_DT, JOIN_DT = COALESCE(MESSENGER_USER.JOIN_DT, EXCLUDED.JOIN_DT), ROLE_CD = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.ROLE_CD, MESSENGER_USER.ROLE_CD), NOTIFY_YN = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.NOTIFY_YN, MESSENGER_USER.NOTIFY_YN)
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, MSGR_ID, JOIN_DT, LEFT_DT, ROLE_CD, NOTIFY_YN FROM MESSENGER_USER
SELECT USER_ID, MSGR_ID, JOIN_DT, LEFT_DT, ROLE_CD, NOTIFY_YN FROM MESSENGER_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} LIMIT 1
